--- import type { ImageMetadata } from "astro" import { Image } from "astro:assets" import { cn } from "@/lib/utils" import { Badge } from "@/components/ui/badge" import { Button } from "@/components/ui/button" import { Price, PriceUnit, PriceValue } from "@/components/ui/price" import { Section, SectionContainer } from "@/components/ui/section" type Props = { class?: string badge: string title: string description: string image: { src: ImageMetadata alt: string } price: { value: number currency: string unit: string } note: string buttons: { label: string href: string variant?: "default" | "outline" | "secondary" | "ghost" }[] } const { class: className, badge, title, description, image, price, note, buttons, } = Astro.props ---
{badge}

{title}

{description}

{price.unit}

{note}

{ buttons.map(({ href, label, ...button }) => ( )) }
